verify_commands.command: rtk .venv/bin/python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('.rebar/criteria_routing.json')); r=d['code_review']['project.review-phase-boundaries']; assert 'project.review-phase-boundaries' in d['activate'] and r['exec'] == '1-TURN' and r['block_threshold'] == 0.90 and r['blocking_enabled'] is False"
verify_commands.dd_text: Routing activates a single-turn project criterion at threshold 0.90 with blocking disabled

verify_commands.command: rtk .venv/bin/python -c "from pathlib import Path; s=Path('.rebar/prompts/code-review-project-review-phase-boundaries.md').read_text(); assert 'execution_mode: single_turn' in s" && rtk .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_review_phase_boundaries.py
verify_commands.dd_text: Prompt is single-turn and the four-phase finding contract passes

verify_commands.command: rtk .venv/bin/rebar criteria eval project.review-phase-boundaries --runs 3 --output json | rtk .venv/bin/python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['recall'] == 1.0 and d['false_accept'] == 0.0 and d['agreement'] == 1.0 and d['stability_min'] >= 2/3 and d['kappa'] >= 0.70, d"
verify_commands.dd_text: Balanced live criterion corpus meets every metric threshold

verify_commands.command: rtk .venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess; allowed={'.rebar/criteria_routing.json', '.rebar/prompts/code-review-project-review-phase-boundaries.md', '.rebar/evals/code-review-project-review-phase-boundaries.eval.yaml', '.gitignore', 'tests/unit/test_project_review_phase_boundaries.py', 'docs/llm-framework.md'}; commits=subprocess.check_output(['git', 'log', 'origin/main', '--format=%H', '--grep=rebar-ticket: 225a-323c-a9f6-436b'], text=True).split(); assert commits, 'criterion commit is not on origin/main'; changed={p for commit in commits for p in subprocess.check_output(['git', 'show', '--format=', '--name-only', commit], text=True).splitlines() if p}; extra=changed-allowed; assert not extra, f'non-project paths changed: {sorted(extra)}'" && rtk .venv/bin/python -c "from pathlib import Path; s=Path('docs/llm-framework.md').read_text(); assert 'Project dogfood: review-phase-boundaries' in s" && rtk .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_review_phase_boundaries.py && rtk make lint
verify_commands.dd_text: Landed criterion commits touch only the approved project-owned assets and pass documentation, tests, and lint

verify_commands.command: rtk .venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess; commits=subprocess.check_output(['git', 'log', 'origin/main', '--format=%H', '--grep=rebar-ticket: 225a-323c-a9f6-436b'], text=True).split(); assert commits, 'criterion commit is not on origin/main'"
verify_commands.dd_text: Criterion change is landed on main
